title: Notice of Abandonment (To Beda Israel Kessy and Carlos Rafeel Traverso of P.O.BOX 6542 Dar-es-Salaam, 2002
title_en: Notice of Abandonment (To Beda Israel Kessy and Carlos Rafeel Traverso of P.O.BOX 6542 Dar-es-Salaam, 2002

provisions.content: Location of the land: Plot No. 2 at Mjimwema in Temeke Rafeel Traverso.
Name of Occupiers: Beda Israel Kessy and Carlo Rafeel Traverso.

Extent and boundaries of the Land: The land has a total area of 2.546 Hactres and its boundaries are more specifically identified in the Registered Plan No. 25848 which is in the Office of the Director for Surveys and Mapping.

Grounds for determining that the land has been abandoned:— (i) The occupiers have failed to develop the land as required by conditions contained in their Certificate of Occupancy. (ii) Land rent is in arrears for several years. (iii) The land has been invaded and developed by some other people. Any person claiming to have an interest in the land must show cause, within sixty (60) days from the date of publication of this notice in the Gazette , why the land should not be declared to be abandoned.
